posts.author: Heliarsl (Helia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I think it is really necessary to have access in PIN when we are in our dashboard, obviously there is a feature to hide that column in dashboard, but if still we have bunch of items, we need for example to pin the first column but it is not possible now!
